suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-7 launch readiness and go/no-go
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-7 was targeted for 'early next week' (week of July 14) as of ACDC #182. This call falls within that window, requiring final readiness confirmation from all client teams (Teku branch update, Grandine completion status) and a launch decision.

suggestions.topic: Beacon API PR #625 (ProduceBlock v4 auth config) feedback from staking pools and DVT providers
suggestions.rationale: Marked as urgent in ACDC #182 (4 days ago) with explicit request for feedback from Lido, Rocket Pool, builders, DVT providers, and VC tooling teams. Critical for finalizing ePBS builder API before devnet-7.

Deferred from ACDC #179 (May 28) with expected revisit 'in two weeks' for SFI decision. Already implemented and tested since devnet-1 per that call, but decision was never reached in subsequent meetings.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam public/Mekong-style devnet scoping and timeline
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #182 targeted early August for public app-testing devnet, citing repricings as key driver. With devnet-7 launching this week, scoping decisions for the public testnet should begin.

suggestions.topic: ePBS circuit breaker implementations and P2P bid attack surface
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #182 showed varying approaches across clients (Teku/Lodestar builder-aware bans, Prysm trusted-builder fallback). Prysm's document on P2P sybil attack mitigation is forthcoming and should be reviewed.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7688 (progressive containers) stability and potential DFI decision
suggestions.rationale: Targeted for devnet-7 in ACDC #181 but not DFI'd; decision was to 'revisit if devnet-6 instability warrants it.' Devnet-6 showed ~80% participation with Nethermind storage issues. Status update needed before devnet-7 launch.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8148 (custom sweep threshold for validators) review and Hegota PFI decision
suggestions.rationale: Proposed for Hegota in ACDC #179; client teams asked to review and Lido requested to provide validator-count data. Not mentioned in three subsequent calls, suggesting no blocking concerns but still awaiting formal decision.
Deadline announced in ACDC #182 is three weeks away. While not urgent today, teams should be reminded to prepare proposals (e.g., EIP-8045 slashed-validator exclusion, EIP-8148 if ready).
